expectations.evidence: Report contains only basic descriptive statistics (means, ranges, counts, monthly tables). No advanced analytics (no Sample Entropy, DFA, Poincare, Granger, Transfer Entropy, CCM, Biological Age, etc.). Only analyze_health.py was run.

expectations.text: Report starts with an executive summary of 3-5 key findings
expectations.evidence: Report starts with 'Personal Profile' section, not an executive summary. The 'Key Insights & Recommendations' section with 11 findings appears at the very end, not the beginning, and exceeds the 3-5 range.

expectations.text: Contains a composite health score table with letter grades
expectations.evidence: No health score table or letter grades appear anywhere in the report. There is no composite scoring system.

expectations.text: Contains a data availability/quality assessment section
expectations.evidence: No dedicated data quality/availability section. The report has a 'Data Types Overview' table listing counts, but no assessment of coverage, gaps, reliability, or quality.

expectations.text: Contains risk stratification with HIGH/MODERATE severity levels
expectations.evidence: No risk stratification with severity levels. The report provides observations and recommendations but does not categorize findings by risk severity (HIGH/MODERATE/LOW).
No evidence grades appear anywhere in the report. Findings are presented as plain observations without graded evidence levels.

expectations.text: Presents Granger causality or transfer entropy results
expectations.evidence: No causal inference analysis of any kind. No Granger causality, transfer entropy, or CCM results. The report contains no statistical tests beyond basic descriptive statistics.

expectations.text: Presents fitness age or biological age estimate
expectations.evidence: No fitness age or biological age estimates. VO2 Max is reported (30.1 mL/kg/min) with a note that it's 'below average' but no age equivalence or biological age model.

Report ends with 'Key Insights & Recommendations' containing 11 numbered items with specific data references (e.g., 'VO2 Max is 30.1', 'BMI 31.0', 'step count has dropped from 10,572/day to 4,217/day'). Recommendations include actionable advice.

Report ends with: 'Disclaimer: This report is generated from Apple Health export data for informational purposes only. It is not a medical diagnosis. Please consult a qualified healthcare professional for medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.'

expectations.text: Uses bootstrap CI or p-values for at least some metrics
expectations.evidence: No confidence intervals, p-values, or statistical tests appear in the report. All metrics are reported as simple descriptive statistics (means, ranges, counts).

expectations.text: Handles all data types gracefully without errors
expectations.evidence: Report covers all 53 data types across multiple sections (heart, glucose, activity, sleep, body composition, respiratory, audio, mobility) with no error messages. Data is presented coherently.
